title: Guided Reinforcement Learning for Robust Multi-Contact Loco-Manipulation
title_zh: 引导式强化学习实现鲁棒的多接触移动操作
abstract:
Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown remarkable proficiency in developing robust control policies for contact-rich applications. However, it typically requires meticulous Markov Decision Process (MDP) designing tailored to each task and robotic platform. This work addresses this challenge by creating a systematic approach to behavior synthesis and control for multi-contact loco-manipulation.
We define a task-independent MDP formulation to learn robust RL policies using a single demonstration (per task) generated from a fast model-based trajectory optimization method. Our framework is validated on diverse real-world tasks, such as navigating spring-loaded doors and manipulating heavy dishwashers. The learned behaviors can handle dynamic uncertainties and external disturbances, showcasing recovery maneuvers, such as re-grasping objects during execution. Finally, we successfully transfer the policies to a real robot, demonstrating the approach's practical viability.
abstract_zh: 强化学习在开发接触密集型应用的鲁棒控制策略方面表现出色，但通常需要为每个任务和机器人平台精心设计马尔可夫决策过程。本文通过创建一种系统化的行为合成与控制方法，解决了多接触移动操作中的这一挑战。我们定义了一种任务无关的MDP公式，利用基于快速模型轨迹优化方法生成的单个演示（每个任务）来学习鲁棒的强化学习策略。该框架在多种真实世界任务上得到验证，例如推开弹簧门和操作重型洗碗机。学习到的行为能够处理动态不确定性和外部干扰，并展示出恢复操作，如在执行过程中重新抓取物体。最后，我们成功将策略迁移到真实机器人上，证明了该方法的实际可行性。
tldr_zh: 提出任务无关的MDP公式，用单次演示学习鲁棒的多接触移动操作策略。
cover_zh: 只用一次演示就能学会开门洗碗？这个强化学习框架让机器人更鲁棒
